member.name: T:PharmeasyAPI.Controllers.AuthController
member.summary: OTP-based authentication for customers, admins, and doctors.

member.name: M:PharmeasyAPI.Controllers.AuthController.SendOtp(PharmeasyAPI.DTOs.SendOtpRequest)
member.summary: Send a one-time password to the given email address.
member.remarks: Creates a new user record if the email is not registered. OTP expires in 10 minutes.

member.name: M:PharmeasyAPI.Controllers.AuthController.VerifyOtpCustomer(PharmeasyAPI.DTOs.VerifyOtpRequest)
member.summary: Verify an OTP and sign in as a Customer.
member.remarks: Returns a JWT token scoped to the Customer role on success.
member.response: JWT token and user info returned.
Invalid or expired OTP, or email not found.

member.name: M:PharmeasyAPI.Controllers.AuthController.VerifyOtpAdmin(PharmeasyAPI.DTOs.VerifyOtpRequest)
member.summary: Verify an OTP and sign in as an Admin.
member.remarks: Returns a JWT token scoped to the Admin role on success.
member.response: JWT token and user info returned.
Invalid or expired OTP, or email not found.

member.name: M:PharmeasyAPI.Controllers.AuthController.VerifyOtpDoctor(PharmeasyAPI.DTOs.VerifyOtpRequest)
member.summary: Verify an OTP and sign in as a Doctor.
member.remarks: Returns a JWT token scoped to the Doctor role on success.
member.response: JWT token and user info returned.
Invalid or expired OTP, or email not found.

member.name: T:PharmeasyAPI.Controllers.BlogsController
member.summary: Blog/article content management.

member.name: M:PharmeasyAPI.Controllers.BlogsController.Create(PharmeasyAPI.DTOs.CreateBlogRequest)
member.summary: Create a new blog post. (Admin only)

member.name: M:PharmeasyAPI.Controllers.BlogsController.GetAll(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: List all blog posts, newest first.

member.name: M:PharmeasyAPI.Controllers.BlogsController.GetById(System.Int32)
member.summary: Retrieve a single blog post by ID.
member.response: No blog post with the given ID.

member.name: M:PharmeasyAPI.Controllers.BlogsController.Patch(System.Int32,PharmeasyAPI.DTOs.PatchBlogRequest)
member.summary: Partially update a blog post (only supplied fields are changed). (Admin only)
member.response: No blog post with the given ID.

member.name: M:PharmeasyAPI.Controllers.BlogsController.Delete(System.Int32)
member.summary: Delete a blog post by ID. (Admin only)
member.response: No blog post with the given ID.

member.name: T:PharmeasyAPI.Controllers.BookingCheckoutController
member.summary: Initiate a doctor-appointment booking and collect payment via Razorpay.

member.name: M:PharmeasyAPI.Controllers.BookingCheckoutController.CheckoutBooking(PharmeasyAPI.DTOs.BookingCheckoutRequest)
member.summary: Initiate a doctor-appointment booking and create a Razorpay payment link.
member.remarks:
**Flow:** 1. Validates the doctor exists and is active. 2. Parses the time slot string (format: HH:mm-HH:mm, e.g. 09:00-09:30). 3. Creates a pending BookingSession with a JSON snapshot of the booking data. 4. Calls the Razorpay API to generate a payment link for the consultation fee. 5. Returns all booking details plus the Razorpay paymentLinkUrl.
The actual Booking record is only created after Razorpay fires the payment_link.paid webhook to POST /checkout/razorpay/webhook.
member.response: Booking session created; returns booking details and Razorpay payment URL.
Invalid time slot format, or customer profile not found.

member.name: T:PharmeasyAPI.Controllers.BookingsController
member.summary: View confirmed appointment bookings.

member.name: M:PharmeasyAPI.Controllers.BookingsController.GetCustomerBookings(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: List the authenticated customer's bookings, newest appointment first.
member.response: Paginated list of the customer's bookings.

member.name: M:PharmeasyAPI.Controllers.BookingsController.GetDoctorBookings(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: List the authenticated doctor's bookings, newest appointment first.
member.response: Paginated list of the doctor's bookings.

member.name: T:PharmeasyAPI.Controllers.CartsController
member.summary: Shopping cart management for the authenticated user.

member.name: M:PharmeasyAPI.Controllers.CartsController.AddToCart(PharmeasyAPI.DTOs.AddToCartRequest)
member.summary: Add a product to the cart (or increase its quantity if already present).
member.response: Updated cart with all items and recalculated total.

member.name: M:PharmeasyAPI.Controllers.CartsController.RemoveFromCart(PharmeasyAPI.DTOs.RemoveFromCartRequest)
member.summary: Remove a product from the cart (or decrease its quantity).
member.remarks: If quantity is omitted or equals/exceeds the current quantity the item is removed entirely.

member.name: M:PharmeasyAPI.Controllers.CartsController.GetCart(System.String)
member.summary: Retrieve the current user's cart with all items and the recalculated total.
member.param: Optional coupon code to preview the discounted total (coupon is NOT applied or recorded).
member.response: Cart with items and total price. When a valid coupon is supplied, includes a couponPreview object with the discount breakdown.
No active cart for this user.

member.name: M:PharmeasyAPI.Controllers.CartsController.DeleteCart
member.summary: Delete the current user's entire cart and all its items.
member.response: No active cart for this user.

member.name: T:PharmeasyAPI.Controllers.CategoriesController
member.summary: CRUD management for product categories.

member.name: M:PharmeasyAPI.Controllers.CategoriesController.Create(PharmeasyAPI.DTOs.CreateCategoryRequest)
member.summary: Create a new product category. (Admin only)

member.name: M:PharmeasyAPI.Controllers.CategoriesController.GetAll(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Retrieve all categories, each including their associated products.
member.response: Paginated, alphabetically ordered list of categories.

member.name: M:PharmeasyAPI.Controllers.CategoriesController.GetById(System.Int32)
member.summary: Retrieve a single category by ID, including its products.
member.response: No category with the given ID.

member.name: M:PharmeasyAPI.Controllers.CategoriesController.Update(System.Int32,PharmeasyAPI.DTOs.UpdateCategoryRequest)
member.summary: Replace all fields of a category. (Admin only)
member.response: No category with the given ID.

member.name: M:PharmeasyAPI.Controllers.CategoriesController.Patch(System.Int32,PharmeasyAPI.DTOs.PatchCategoryRequest)
member.summary: Partially update a category (only supplied fields are changed). (Admin only)
member.response: No category with the given ID.

member.name: M:PharmeasyAPI.Controllers.CategoriesController.Delete(System.Int32)
member.summary: Delete a category by ID. (Admin only)
member.response: No category with the given ID.

member.name: T:PharmeasyAPI.Controllers.CouponsController
member.summary: Discount coupon management and application.

member.name: M:PharmeasyAPI.Controllers.CouponsController.Create(PharmeasyAPI.DTOs.CreateCouponRequest)
member.summary: Create a new discount coupon. (Admin only)
member.response: A coupon with this name already exists.

member.name: M:PharmeasyAPI.Controllers.CouponsController.GetAll(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: List all coupons including their usage records.
member.response: Paginated, alphabetically ordered list of coupons.

member.name: M:PharmeasyAPI.Controllers.CouponsController.GetById(System.Int32)
member.summary: Retrieve a single coupon by ID.
member.response: No coupon with the given ID.

member.name: M:PharmeasyAPI.Controllers.CouponsController.Patch(System.Int32,PharmeasyAPI.DTOs.PatchCouponRequest)
member.summary: Partially update a coupon (only supplied fields are changed). (Admin only)
member.response: No coupon with the given ID.

member.name: M:PharmeasyAPI.Controllers.CouponsController.Delete(System.Int32)
member.summary: Delete a coupon by ID. (Admin only)
member.response: No coupon with the given ID.

member.name: M:PharmeasyAPI.Controllers.CouponsController.Apply(PharmeasyAPI.DTOs.ApplyCouponRequest)
member.summary: Apply a coupon to the authenticated customer's cart and record usage.
member.remarks: Validates the coupon name and the customer's remaining usage allowance before applying the discount.
member.response: Discount amount and new cart total returned.
Coupon not applicable or customer/cart not found.

member.name: T:PharmeasyAPI.Controllers.CovidsController
member.summary: COVID-related product/test listings.

member.name: M:PharmeasyAPI.Controllers.CovidsController.Create(PharmeasyAPI.DTOs.CreateCategoryItemRequest)
member.summary: Create a COVID product/test entry.

member.name: M:PharmeasyAPI.Controllers.CovidsController.GetAll(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: List all COVID product/test entries.

member.name: M:PharmeasyAPI.Controllers.CovidsController.Delete(System.Int32)
member.summary: Delete a COVID entry by ID.
member.response: No entry with the given ID.

member.name: T:PharmeasyAPI.Controllers.DeliveryChargesController
member.summary: Delivery charge rules keyed by postal pincode.

member.name: M:PharmeasyAPI.Controllers.DeliveryChargesController.Create(PharmeasyAPI.DTOs.CreateDeliveryChargeRequest)
member.summary: Create a delivery charge record for a pincode. (Admin only)
member.response: A record for this pincode already exists.

member.name: M:PharmeasyAPI.Controllers.DeliveryChargesController.GetAll(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: List all delivery charge records ordered by pincode.
member.response: Paginated list of delivery charge records.

member.name: M:PharmeasyAPI.Controllers.DeliveryChargesController.GetById(System.Int32)
member.summary: Retrieve a delivery charge record by ID.
member.response: No record with the given ID.

member.name: M:PharmeasyAPI.Controllers.DeliveryChargesController.CheckDelivery(System.String)
member.summary: Check delivery availability and charge for a specific pincode.
member.response: Delivery status and charge (charge is null when pincode is unknown).

member.name: M:PharmeasyAPI.Controllers.DeliveryChargesController.Patch(System.Int32,PharmeasyAPI.DTOs.PatchDeliveryChargeRequest)
member.summary: Partially update a delivery charge record. (Admin only)
member.response: No record with the given ID.
Another record already uses the new pincode.

member.name: M:PharmeasyAPI.Controllers.DeliveryChargesController.Delete(System.Int32)
member.summary: Delete a delivery charge record by ID. (Admin only)
member.response: No record with the given ID.

member.name: T:PharmeasyAPI.Controllers.DoctorsController
member.summary: Doctor profile management and customer-facing doctor discovery.

member.name: M:PharmeasyAPI.Controllers.DoctorsController.CreateDoctor(PharmeasyAPI.DTOs.CreateDoctorRequest)
member.summary: Create a new doctor account and profile. (Admin only)
member.remarks: Creates a User with role Doctor and a linked DoctorProfile in a single call.
member.response: Doctor created; returns the profile DTO.
A user with this email already exists.

member.name: M:PharmeasyAPI.Controllers.DoctorsController.PatchDoctor(System.Int32,PharmeasyAPI.DTOs.PatchDoctorRequest)
member.summary: Partially update a doctor profile. (Admin only)
member.response: No doctor profile with the given ID.
Another user already uses the supplied email.

member.name: M:PharmeasyAPI.Controllers.DoctorsController.DeleteDoctor(System.Int32)
member.summary: Delete a doctor profile. (Admin only)
member.remarks: The underlying user is demoted to Customer role to preserve booking history.
member.response: No doctor profile with the given ID.

member.name: M:PharmeasyAPI.Controllers.DoctorsController.GetDoctorById(System.Int32)
member.summary: Retrieve a single doctor profile by ID. (Admin only)
member.response: No doctor profile with the given ID.

member.name: M:PharmeasyAPI.Controllers.DoctorsController.GetAllDoctors(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: List all doctor profiles. (Admin only)
member.response: Paginated list of all profiles, newest first.

member.name: M:PharmeasyAPI.Controllers.DoctorsController.GetAllDoctorsForCustomer(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: List all active doctors (summary view for customers). No authentication required.
member.response: Paginated, alphabetically ordered list of active doctors with consultation fee.

member.name: M:PharmeasyAPI.Controllers.DoctorsController.GetDoctorForCustomer(System.Int32)
member.summary: Get a doctor's full profile with per-weekday available 30-minute slots. No authentication required.
member.remarks: Available slots are computed by subtracting the doctor's unavailability blocks from the full 24-hour day, then splitting each resulting window into 30-minute intervals (e.g. 09:00–09:30, 09:30–10:00).
member.response: Doctor detail with weekly availability slots.
No active doctor with the given ID.

member.name: T:PharmeasyAPI.Controllers.DoctorUnavailabilitiesController
member.summary: Manage doctor unavailability blocks used to compute available appointment slots.

member.name: M:PharmeasyAPI.Controllers.DoctorUnavailabilitiesController.CreateForDoctor(PharmeasyAPI.DTOs.CreateDoctorUnavailabilityRequest)
member.summary: Add an unavailability block for the authenticated doctor's own schedule.
member.remarks: startTime and endTime must be in HH:mm format. endTime must be after startTime.
member.response: Invalid time format or end time not after start time.
No doctor profile linked to the authenticated user.

member.name: M:PharmeasyAPI.Controllers.DoctorUnavailabilitiesController.CreateForDoctorAdmin(PharmeasyAPI.DTOs.CreateDoctorUnavailabilityAdminRequest)
member.summary: Add an unavailability block for any doctor by profile ID. (Admin only)
member.remarks: startTime and endTime must be in HH:mm format. endTime must be after startTime.
member.response: No doctor profile with the given ID.

member.name: M:PharmeasyAPI.Controllers.DoctorUnavailabilitiesController.GetDoctorUnavailabilities(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: List all unavailability blocks for the authenticated doctor.
member.response: Paginated unavailability blocks ordered by weekday and start time.
No doctor profile linked to the authenticated user.

member.name: M:PharmeasyAPI.Controllers.DoctorUnavailabilitiesController.GetDoctorUnavailabilitiesAdmin(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: List all unavailability blocks for a specific doctor by profile ID. (Admin only)
member.response: Paginated unavailability blocks ordered by weekday and start time.

member.name: M:PharmeasyAPI.Controllers.DoctorUnavailabilitiesController.GetById(System.Int32)
member.summary: Retrieve a single unavailability block by ID. Accessible by the owning doctor or an Admin.
member.response: Block does not belong to the authenticated doctor.
No block with the given ID.

member.name: M:PharmeasyAPI.Controllers.DoctorUnavailabilitiesController.Patch(System.Int32,PharmeasyAPI.DTOs.PatchDoctorUnavailabilityRequest)
member.summary: Partially update an unavailability block. Accessible by the owning doctor or an Admin.
member.response: Block does not belong to the authenticated doctor.
No block with the given ID.

member.name: M:PharmeasyAPI.Controllers.DoctorUnavailabilitiesController.Delete(System.Int32)
member.summary: Delete an unavailability block. Accessible by the owning doctor or an Admin.
member.response: Block does not belong to the authenticated doctor.
No block with the given ID.

member.name: T:PharmeasyAPI.Controllers.HealthcareDataController
member.summary: General healthcare informational data entries.

member.name: T:PharmeasyAPI.Controllers.HealthFoodAndDrinksController
member.summary: Health food and drinks product listings.

member.name: M:PharmeasyAPI.Controllers.HealthFoodAndDrinksController.Create(PharmeasyAPI.DTOs.CreateCategoryItemRequest)
member.summary: Create a health food or drink entry.

member.name: M:PharmeasyAPI.Controllers.HealthFoodAndDrinksController.GetAll(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: List all health food and drink entries.

member.name: M:PharmeasyAPI.Controllers.HealthFoodAndDrinksController.Delete(System.Int32)
member.summary: Delete a health food or drink entry by ID.
member.response: No entry with the given ID.

member.name: T:PharmeasyAPI.Controllers.OrdersController
member.summary: Order history — view and manage completed product orders.

member.name: M:PharmeasyAPI.Controllers.OrdersController.GetAllOrders(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: List every order in the system. (Admin only)
member.response: Paginated list of all orders, newest first.

member.name: M:PharmeasyAPI.Controllers.OrdersController.GetOrderByIdAdmin(System.Int32)
member.summary: Retrieve a specific order by ID. (Admin only)
member.response: No order with the given ID.

member.name: M:PharmeasyAPI.Controllers.OrdersController.GetMyOrders(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: List all orders belonging to the currently authenticated customer.
member.response: Paginated list of the customer's orders, newest first.

member.name: M:PharmeasyAPI.Controllers.OrdersController.GetMyOrderById(System.Int32)
member.summary: Retrieve a specific order that belongs to the authenticated customer.
member.response: Order not found or does not belong to this customer.

member.name: M:PharmeasyAPI.Controllers.OrdersController.DeleteOrder(System.Int32)
member.summary: Delete an order. Customers may only delete their own; Admins may delete any.
member.response: Order does not belong to this customer.
No order with the given ID.

member.name: T:PharmeasyAPI.Controllers.ProductCheckoutController
member.summary: Product cart checkout and Razorpay webhook handling.

member.name: M:PharmeasyAPI.Controllers.ProductCheckoutController.CheckoutProducts(PharmeasyAPI.DTOs.ProductCheckoutRequest)
member.summary: Initiate checkout for the authenticated customer's cart and generate a Razorpay payment link.
member.remarks:
**Flow:** 1. Resolves the cart and optionally validates/applies a coupon. 2. Creates a CheckoutSession with a snapshot of the cart items. 3. Calls the Razorpay API and returns the payment link URL.
Orders are only created after Razorpay fires the payment_link.paid webhook.
member.response: Checkout initiated; returns cart summary and Razorpay payment URL.
Cart is empty, coupon is invalid, or customer profile missing.

member.name: M:PharmeasyAPI.Controllers.ProductCheckoutController.RazorpayWebhook
member.summary: Razorpay webhook endpoint — confirms payment for product orders and doctor bookings.
member.remarks:
Razorpay calls this URL after a payment link is paid. The signature in the X-Razorpay-Signature header is verified with HMAC-SHA256 before any action is taken.
- For **product** payments: creates Order records and clears the cart. - For **booking** payments: creates the Booking record linked to customer and doctor.
Configure this URL in the Razorpay dashboard under **Webhooks**.
member.response: Webhook processed (always returns 200 to Razorpay, even for no-ops).
Missing or invalid signature, or malformed payload.

member.name: T:PharmeasyAPI.Controllers.ProductsController
member.summary: CRUD management for pharmacy products.

member.name: M:PharmeasyAPI.Controllers.ProductsController.Create(PharmeasyAPI.DTOs.CreateProductRequest)
member.summary: Create a new product. (Admin only)
member.response: Product created and returned with its category.

member.name: M:PharmeasyAPI.Controllers.ProductsController.GetAll(System.String,System.Nullable{System.Int32},System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: List all products, with optional keyword search and category filter.
member.param: Optional keyword matched against name, summary, and description.
Optional category ID to filter results.
member.response: Paginated, alphabetically ordered list of matching products.

member.name: M:PharmeasyAPI.Controllers.ProductsController.GetById(System.Int32)
member.summary: Retrieve a single product by ID.
member.response: No product with the given ID.

member.name: M:PharmeasyAPI.Controllers.ProductsController.Update(System.Int32,PharmeasyAPI.DTOs.UpdateProductRequest)
member.summary: Replace all fields of a product. (Admin only)
member.response: No product with the given ID.

member.name: M:PharmeasyAPI.Controllers.ProductsController.Patch(System.Int32,PharmeasyAPI.DTOs.PatchProductRequest)
member.summary: Partially update a product (only supplied fields are changed). (Admin only)
member.response: No product with the given ID.

member.name: M:PharmeasyAPI.Controllers.ProductsController.Delete(System.Int32)
member.summary: Delete a product by ID. (Admin only)
member.response: No product with the given ID.

member.name: T:PharmeasyAPI.Controllers.ProfileController
member.summary: Manages the authenticated user's own profile.

member.name: M:PharmeasyAPI.Controllers.ProfileController.GetProfile
member.summary: Get the authenticated user's profile, including their Customer or Doctor sub-profile.
member.remarks: Pass the JWT in the Authorization: Bearer <token> header.
member.response: Returns user info and role-specific profile data.

member.name: M:PharmeasyAPI.Controllers.ProfileController.CompleteProfile(PharmeasyAPI.DTOs.CompleteProfileRequest)
member.summary: Complete the profile of the currently logged-in user.
member.remarks: Sets the user's name and phone number and marks the account as no longer new. Should be called once after the first login.
member.response: Profile updated; returns the full user object.

member.name: T:PharmeasyAPI.Controllers.SkincareController
member.summary: Skincare product listings.

member.name: M:PharmeasyAPI.Controllers.SkincareController.Create(PharmeasyAPI.DTOs.CreateCategoryItemRequest)
member.summary: Create a skincare product entry.

member.name: M:PharmeasyAPI.Controllers.SkincareController.GetAll(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: List all skincare product entries.

member.name: M:PharmeasyAPI.Controllers.SkincareController.Delete(System.Int32)
member.summary: Delete a skincare product entry by ID.
member.response: No entry with the given ID.
